qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_tipo_tarea as oi_tipo_tarea, t0.c_tipo_tarea as c_tipo_tarea, t0.d_tipo_tarea as d_tipo_tarea, t0.e_dias_vencimiento as e_dias_vencimiento, SEC.policy, t0.c_tipo_tarea as CODE, t0.d_tipo_tarea as TEXT FROM LEG35_TIPOS_TAREAS as t0,NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Legales.Tipos_Tarea.TIPO_TAREA\') as SEC JOIN t0.oi_tipo_tarea LEFT OUTER SEC.id ORDER BY oi_tipo_tarea asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_tipo_tarea as oi_tipo_tarea, SEC.policy FROM LEG35_TIPOS_TAREAS as t0,NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Legales.Tipos_Tarea.TIPO_TAREA\') as SEC JOIN t0.oi_tipo_tarea LEFT OUTER SEC.id ORDER BY oi_tipo_tarea asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Legales.Tipos_Tarea.TIPO_TAREA.QUERY
NucleusRH.Base.Legales.Tipos_Tarea.TIPO_TAREA.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(LEG35_TIPOS_TAREAS.oi_tipo_tarea) as CNT from LEG35_TIPOS_TAREAS Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and LEG35_TIPOS_TAREAS.oi_tipo_tarea={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(LEG35_TIPOS_TAREAS.d_tipo_tarea,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(LEG35_TIPOS_TAREAS.c_tipo_tarea,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and [PARENT]={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qryTipoTarea
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL('
SELECT LEG35_TIPOS_TAREAS.oi_tipo_tarea
FROM LEG35_TIPOS_TAREAS
WHERE LEG35_TIPOS_TAREAS.c_tipo_tarea = {#PARAM:@c_tipo_tarea}
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Legales.Tipos_Tarea.TIPO_TAREA.QUERY
NucleusRH.Base.Legales.Tipos_Tarea.TIPO_TAREA.COUNT
